description: Description of stock returns, investment returns, and estimation residuals.This figure scatter plots stock returns (rS) against investment returns (rI), and stock returns against estimation residuals (error) terms, based on the estimation results from one-step GMM on the cross-sectional moments given by Eq. (8), using book-to-market deciles as the testing portfolios. Portfolio-aggregation follows LWZ. The sample is from 1963 to 2020.

Cross-sectional fit versus time-series fit.The top panel plots the cross-sectional R2 (XS−R2) and the time-series R2 (XS−R2). The bottom panel plots the mean absolute cross sectional errors (in percentage per annum) given by Eq. (14) and the mean absolute time series errors (in percentage per annum) given by Eq. (17). Horizontal axis shows the prespecified weighting matrix, in which the first component refers to the weights on the cross-sectional moments and the second component refers to the weights on the time-series moments, so that the axis goes from zero weight on time-series moments (only cross-sectional moments used) to all weight on time-series moments (no cross-sectional moments used). Portfolio-aggregation follows LWZ. The sample is from 1963 to 2020.
